leaderboardDocumentShape.notes: section-8's admin dashboard reads the same /leaderboards/{scale} documents that section-7 reads. The admin view may add 'hidden tournament' rollups or per-tournament drill-down, but the underlying shape is the one defined in section-4--section-7.json.

notes: Minimal contract: section-8's reads piggyback on section-7's source of truth. Writes go through section-4 Cloud Functions per section-4--section-8.json.
